user_query: How does Gina stay confident in her business?

node_data.text: Gina gives Jon tips to stay confident in business by reminding of successes and progress, having a good support system, and having faith in oneself.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Directly discusses how Gina stays confident in business by reminding herself of successes, having a support system, and faith in herself.

node_data.text: Gina encourages Jon to believe in himself, tackle obstacles, and keep shining in pursuing his dreams.

node_data.text: Gina's design in her clothing line reminds her of the grit needed to stand out and face challenges.
